parameters.db_version: PostgreSQL 16.11 (Debian 16.11-1.pgdg13+1) on x86_64-pc-linux-gnu, compiled by gcc (Debian 14.2.0-19) 14.2.0, 64-bit

result_schema.title: is_zakupka
result_schema.guid_formula:
IF ICONTAINS([invite_link_name_0op2], '[fb]') 
   OR ICONTAINS([invite_link_name_0op2], '[yt]') 
   OR [invite_link_name_0op2] IS NULL
   OR ICONTAINS([invite_link_name_0op2], '[yandex]') 
   OR ICONTAINS([invite_link_name_0op2], '[google]') THEN
    "Нет"
ELSE
    "Да"
END
result_schema.formula:
IF ICONTAINS([invite_link_name], '[fb]') 
   OR ICONTAINS([invite_link_name], '[yt]') 
   OR [invite_link_name] IS NULL
   OR ICONTAINS([invite_link_name], '[yandex]') 
   OR ICONTAINS([invite_link_name], '[google]') THEN
    "Нет"
ELSE
    "Да"
END
